name: cpig-r5-dense-progressive-gate
description: R5 flagship gate — a dense mesh field (speedboat.stl) pushed to Penumbra via _CPigFromMesh (single-mesh PushGrid fast path, N=64 coarse). The cascade baker should progressively refine it via the registered CPig SampleToGrid provider. Gates on: the field renders + converges to steady state. Verifies the R5 dense progressive path end-to-end (UBO 64 atoms + RegisterFieldProvider + CPig SampleToGrid callback).

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D viewport showing a curved boat-shaped mesh part rendered as a ray-marched SDF surface. The surface should look smooth and solid, not blocky or empty. This verifies the dense progressive path: the mesh field is pushed at coarse resolution and refined by the cascade baker.
